palette_hint: Deep navy background #0B1F3A with off-white body text #E8EDF2, accented by signal amber #F5A623 and seafoam teal #2ABFBF for interactive states and highlights.
type_style: Headings in system 'Georgia' serif at weights 700 for gravitas, body and form labels in 'Courier New' monospace at weight 400 for precision/data feel, small caps for section headers.
description: Ironclad Maritime Registry is a dense government-style portal for commercial vessel operators to register ships, certify crew, file voyage manifests, submit compliance audits, and review fee schedules — all forms paired with live data tables.
constraints: Max content width 1200px centered with 24px horizontal padding; form sections use a strict 3-column grid with 16px gutters; labels sit above inputs at 11px uppercase 'Courier New', inputs have 8px 12px padding, 1px solid #2ABFBF border, #0D2647 background, and #E8EDF2 text.

Custom checkboxes are 16x16px squares with #0D2647 fill and a 2px #2ABFBF border, showing a teal checkmark via CSS content on :checked; custom radios are 16px circles with an inner 8px amber #F5A623 dot on :checked; toggles are 40x20px pill shapes with a sliding white 16px circle, teal when on, slate #3A5068 when off.

Data tables have sticky thead with #F5A623 amber text on #0D2647 background, zebra rows alternating #0B1F3A and #0D2647, 6px 12px cell padding, right-aligned monospace numerics, and a 1px #1E3A5F border between all cells.

Summary stat cards appear as a horizontal strip of 4–5 cards above each table: each card is 160px wide, #0D2647 background, 2px solid #2ABFBF border, 12px radius, showing a large 28px amber number and 11px uppercase label below.

Form validation states: required inputs show a 2px solid #E84040 red border and a red 10px asterisk label suffix on :invalid:not(:focus); valid filled inputs show a 2px solid #2ABFBF teal border; select and textarea match the same border rules.

page_specs.vessel-registration: A four-section form (Vessel Identity, Technical Specifications, Ownership & Insurance, Safety Equipment) with 18 inputs total including vessel name, IMO number, flag state select, gross tonnage, hull material radio group (Steel/Aluminum/FRP/Wood), build year, port of registry, owner entity name, owner country select, insurance provider, policy number, expiry date, P&I club, three equipment toggles (EPIRB/AIS/Liferaft), and a textarea for remarks. Below the form a data table of 22 registered vessels shows columns: IMO No., Vessel Name, Flag, Type, GT (right-aligned), Registry Date, Status — with stat cards for Total Vessels, Active, Suspended, Pending Review.
page_specs.crew-certification: A three-section form (Seafarer Details, Certificate Information, Medical Fitness) with 16 inputs covering full name, date of birth, nationality select, seafarer ID, rank select, STCW certificate number, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, endorsement type radio group (Original/Renewal/Duplicate), medical grade radio (A/B/C), doctor name, clinic address, and two checkboxes for GMDSS endorsement and tanker endorsement. Below the form a 24-row table of current certifications shows columns: Seafarer ID, Full Name, Rank, Certificate No., Issue Date, Expiry Date, Status — with stat cards for Total Certified, Expiring in 30 Days, Expired, Awaiting Approval.
page_specs.voyage-manifest: A five-section form (Voyage Details, Departure Port, Arrival Port, Cargo Declaration, Passenger Count) with 20 inputs including voyage number, vessel IMO select, departure port, departure country, ETD datetime, arrival port, arrival country, ETA datetime, cargo type select, cargo description textarea, dangerous goods toggle, UN number, total cargo weight, number of containers, passenger count, crew aboard, pilot required toggle, customs pre-clearance checkbox, agent name, and agent contact. The accompanying table lists 20 recent voyage manifests with columns: Voyage No., Vessel, Departure, Arrival, ETD, ETA, Cargo Type, Status — above which stat cards show Active Voyages, Completed This Month, Cargo Tonnage, Vessels at Sea.
page_specs.compliance-audit: A four-section form (Audit Identification, Inspection Findings, Deficiency Records, Corrective Actions) with 17 inputs including audit reference number, vessel IMO select, inspector name, inspection date, port state control select, inspection type radio (PSC/Flag/Class/ISM), overall result radio (Clear/Deficiency/Detention), deficiency code, deficiency description textarea, severity select (Minor/Major/Critical), corrective action textarea, responsible officer, target completion date, follow-up required toggle, detention reason textarea, ISM non-conformity checkbox, and MARPOL violation checkbox. A table of 22 recent audit records shows columns: Audit Ref, Vessel, Inspector, Date, Type, Result, Deficiencies — with stat cards for Audits This Quarter, Detentions, Open Deficiencies, Cleared.
page_specs.fee-schedule: A three-section calculator form (Applicant Details, Service Selection, Payment Method) with 15 inputs including applicant name, company, email, phone, application type select, vessel GT bracket select, expedited processing toggle, multiple service checkboxes (Registration/Renewal/Duplicate/Endorsement/Survey), discount code, bank reference, payment method radio (Bank Transfer/Credit Card/Cheque), card number, expiry, and CVV. The fee table lists 25 fee line items across columns: Service Code, Service Name, Vessel Class, Base Fee (right-aligned), Surcharge %, Expedited Fee, Effective Date — with stat cards for Total Collected YTD, Outstanding Invoices, Average Fee, Waivers Granted.
